LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ROTHSTEIN, KASS & COMPANY, LLP'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION BROUGHT BY PARON CAPITAL IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. IN ORDER TO PREVENT THESE CAUSES OF ACTION FROM BEING BARRED BECAUSE IT IS IN PARI DELICTO, PARON MUST PLEAD FACTS TO SHOW THAT CROMBIE'S CONDUCT WAS COMPLETELY ADVERSE TO THE COMPANY'S INTEREST AND OUTSIDE THE SCOPE OF AUTHORITY. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION (NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION) AS TO PLAINTIFFS MCCONNON AND LYONS IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS TO SHOW THAT THE REPORT WAS INTENDED TO BENEFIT THEM IN THEIR INDIVIDUAL CAPACITIES. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (PROFESSIONAL MALPRACTICE) AS TO PLAINTIFFS MCCONNON AND LYONS IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. ONLY PARON WAS IS CONTRACT WITH DEFENDANT AND THUS, IS THE ONLY PARTY WHO CAN BRING THIS CLAIM. BILY V. ARTHUR YOUNG (1992) 3 CAL.4TH 370, 405. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION (FRAUD) AS TO PLAINTIFFS MCCONNON AND LYONS IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFFS MUST PLEAD FACTS TO SHOW DEFENDANT'S INTENT TO INDUCE RELIANCE ON THE REPRESENTATIONS AND DISCLAIMERS IN THE ENGAGEMENT LETTER AND REPORT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: MITCH LYON, CSR #6840

Defendant Rothstein, Kass & Company, Llp'S Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT ROTHSTEIN, KASS & COMPANY, LLP'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: J. Noah Hagey, Esq. of BraunHagey 599-0211 for pltfs & opposing parties; Alexis Loeb, Esq. 510/874-1108 & David W. Shapiro, Esq. 510/874-1005 of Boies, Schiller & Flexner LLP for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - Defendant's Demurrer to all causes of action brought by Paron Capital is sustained with leave to amend. In order to prevent these causes of action from being barred because it is in pari delicto, Paron must plead facts to show that Crombie's conduct was completely adverse to the company's interest and outside the scope of authority.
Defendant's Demurrer to the 1st cause of action (negligent misrepresentation) as to Plaintiffs McConnon and Lyons is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead facts to show that the report was intended to benefit them in their individual capacities.
Defendant's Demurrer to the 2nd cause of action (professional malpractice) as to Plaintiffs McConnon and Lyons is sustained without leave to amend. Only Paron was is contract with Defendant and thus, is the only party who can bring this claim. Bily v. Arthur Young (1992) 3 Cal.4th 370, 405.
Defendant's Demurrer to the 3rd cause of action (fraud) as to Plaintiffs McConnon and Lyons is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiffs must plead facts to show Defendant's intent to induce reliance on the representations and disclaimers in the Engagement Letter and Report. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840
